notes: Loading screen and then nothing as per other post
title: DYNASTY WARRIORS® 8 Empires

notes:
So after looking at the other Dynasty Warrior game entries on here I tried some of the fixes they mentioned. Disabling show movies in the config does let it boot past the loading screen. 

You can get in game and play!

However, the controller issue is present here, spins to the left constantly, so you cannot play with a controller. 

There are also graphical issue in the game. Fire on torches does this weird odd colored glow and as it gets to the edge of the screen shoots out black circles from it. Mouse attacks are colored strangely and are transparent and without detail.

Its technically playable, but its not a good time unfortunately.
title: DYNASTY WARRIORS® 8 Empires
